# Photo Portugal - Vacation Photographer Marketplace

> Professional photographer marketplace connecting tourists with local photographers across Portugal for vacation photoshoots. Book experienced photographers for couples, families, proposals, honeymoons, solo travel, elopements, and group trips.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://photoportugal.com): Search photographers by location and type
- [Photographers](https://photoportugal.com/photographers): Browse all approved photographers with portfolios and reviews
- [How It Works](https://photoportugal.com/how-it-works): 4-step booking process explained
- [Pricing](https://photoportugal.com/pricing): Photographer plans and commission structure
- [FAQ](https://photoportugal.com/faq): 20+ frequently asked questions
- [Blog](https://photoportugal.com/blog): 39 photography and travel guides
- [Join as Photographer](https://photoportugal.com/join): Photographer registration with early bird tiers

## 23 Locations Across Portugal

Lisbon, Sintra, Cascais, Costa da Caparica, Setubal, Comporta, Guimaraes, Porto, Braga, Douro Valley, Aveiro, Peneda-Geres, Tomar, Peniche, Coimbra, Obidos, Nazare, Evora, Algarve, Lagos, Tavira, Madeira, Azores

## 8 Photoshoot Types

1. Couples - Romantic vacation photography
2. Family - Kid-friendly vacation sessions
3. Proposal - Surprise proposal documentation
4. Engagement - Pre-wedding sessions
5. Honeymoon - Newlywed romantic photography
6. Solo Travel - Solo traveler portraits
7. Elopement - Intimate ceremony documentation
8. Friends Trip - Group travel photography

## Pricing

- Photoshoot packages start from EUR 90
- 10% platform service fee paid by client
- Photographer plans: Free (20% commission), Pro EUR 29/mo (15%), Premium EUR 59/mo (10%)

## How Booking Works

1. Browse photographers by location, type, language, price
2. Select photographer and package
3. Pay securely via Stripe
4. Photographer confirms and coordinates via real-time chat
5. Photoshoot happens at chosen location
6. Photos delivered within 3-14 days via private gallery

## Differentiators

- 23 Portuguese locations (vs 5-10 for competitors like Flytographer/Localgrapher)
- Verified local photographers with real client reviews
- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
- Real-time messaging between client and photographer
- Multiple photoshoot types for every occasion
- Bilingual platform (English + Portuguese)

## Contact

- Email: info@photoportugal.com
- Website: https://photoportugal.com
- Support: https://photoportugal.com/support
